elements.title: doppa
elements.contents: ... that the designs on a doppa (example pictured) symbolize details about its wearer?

elements.title: Haitian Communist Party
elements.contents: ... that the first leader of the Haitian Communist Party was arrested for requesting "matériel", which the authorities interpreted to mean explosives but which turned out to be literature?

elements.title: Wylly Folk St. John
elements.contents: ... that Wylly Folk St. John based most of the characters in her books on her relatives?

elements.title: Yamato Kochi
elements.contents: ... that Yamato Kochi appeared in character at New York City Subway stations to promote a Japanese film's North American debut?

elements.title: HSwMS Västervik
elements.contents: ... that the crew of HSwMS Västervik were ordered to leave their possessions behind when the ship was decommissioned?

elements.title: Joseph Humphrey Sloss
elements.contents: ... that U.S. congressman Joseph Humphrey Sloss shot his future son-in-law with a shotgun?

elements.title: Cosme
elements.contents: ... that the restaurant Cosme occupies a former strip club in New York City?

elements.title: Smith Island
elements.contents: ... that Smith Island in Hudson Bay has several significant archaeological sites dating from the Thule and Paleo-Eskimo periods?

elements.title: Harry Leons
elements.contents: ... that Harry Leons had "no chance" of ever becoming his football team's starting quarterback, only to later serve for multiple seasons?
